nasb.text: In the thirty-sixth year of Asa’s reign Baasha king of Israel came up against Judah and fortified Ramah in order to prevent anyone from going out or coming in to Asa king of Judah.

esv.text: In the thirty-sixth year of the reign of Asa, Baasha king of Israel went up against Judah and built Ramah, that he might permit no one to go out or come in to Asa king of Judah.

cnv.text: 亞撒在位第三十六年，以色列王巴沙上來攻打猶大，修築拉瑪，不許人離開或進入猶大王亞撒的國境。

ccb.text: 亚撒执政第三十六年，以色列王巴沙上来攻打犹大，修筑拉玛，企图隔断犹大王亚撒与外界的联系。
